runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP targeted QA - 2026-05-26..27 modified surfaces only

Vision live image QA - skipped; no Vision routing/provider change in the selected commits
Reporter advanced flow - skipped; no reporter UI flow change in the selected commits
Cloud Run admin /monitoring and /monitoring/traces - skipped; selected Vercel Playwright scope was frontend/UI and AI sidebar behavior

expertAssessments.rationale: P17, anomaly scan wording, P14 and P10 passed, but Q-NEW48 directional filtering and P13 single-server multi-metric behavior regressed in the Playwright production UI.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Fix Q-NEW48 directional route preservation and P13 multi-metric metric selection, then rerun the two failed prompts on Vercel.

expertAssessments.rationale: Speed Insights posted vitals successfully, but Web Analytics script returned 404 and produced production console errors after Analytics reactivation.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Enable Web Analytics for the Vercel project or gate/remove Analytics import until /_vercel/insights/script.js is served.

expertAssessments.rationale: The requested modified surfaces were exercised through Playwright MCP using real Vercel production navigation and AI sidebar form submission.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after targeted Playwright MCP QA; effective usage 17.9292 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no billed overage observed.

pendingImprovements.title: Vercel Web Analytics script loads without production console errors
pendingImprovements.evidence: Playwright MCP landing load: /_vercel/insights/script.js returned 404 and strict MIME console error after Analytics import reactivation.

pendingImprovements.title: Q-NEW48 CPU 낮고 메모리 높은 역상관 복합 조건 필터
pendingImprovements.evidence: Fresh Playwright MCP AI sidebar prompt 'CPU는 낮고 메모리는 높은 서버 찾아줘' returned generic fleet health summary via monitoring-server-health instead of applying CPU-low AND memory-high directional filter.

pendingImprovements.title: P13/Q-NEW34 single-server CPU+memory query returns both requested metrics
pendingImprovements.evidence: Playwright MCP prompt 'api-was-dc1-01의 CPU와 메모리 상태를 같이 알려줘' returned CPU 63% only and omitted memory, while the server detail page showed memory 53%.

notes: User requested Vercel Playwright MCP QA only for yesterday/today modified areas, so this intentionally excludes broad route/device/provider matrices.
Release decision for the tested modified scope: no-go until the three failed modified surfaces are fixed or explicitly accepted.
GET /api/servers 404 was intentionally triggered by the test to verify root route deletion; server detail /api/servers/api-was-dc1-01 remained 200.
